vertical.name: Tilt Up
vertical.what: camera rotates on horizontal axis upward

vertical.name: Tilt Down
vertical.what: camera rotates on horizontal axis downward

orbit_arc.name: Robo Arm
orbit_arc.what: precision mechanical arc path — product reveals

zoom.name: Rack Focus
zoom.what: refocus between near and far subjects

ugc.name: iPhone selfie feel
ugc.what: front-camera POV, slight handheld wobble, natural skin texture, vertical 9:16

ugc.name: Mirror selfie
ugc.what: subject reflected in bedroom/bathroom mirror, phone visible in hand

ugc.name: Tripod fixed
ugc.what: static lockoff, slight room lighting drift, conversational framing

ugc.name: Locked-off doc
ugc.what: documentary realism, no movement, real-life ambient sound

ugc.name: Phone overhead flat-lay
ugc.what: top-down phone-camera angle on flat surface, product centered

ugc.name: Ring-light vlog
ugc.what: vlog YouTube-style framing, soft ring-light catchlights, 4:5 or 9:16 crop

time_based.name: Timelapse Human
time_based.what: fixed camera, fast-forward time, human subject

time_based.name: Low Shutter
time_based.what: motion blur from slow shutter speed

cut_vocabulary.double_contrast: Every cut changes BOTH shot size AND camera character. Never repeat the same mode across a cut.
cut_vocabulary.180_rule: Keep camera on one side of the imaginary line between subjects to preserve screen direction.
cut_vocabulary.exit_frame_implicit_cut: Once a character leaves frame, they are gone. Never choreograph exit + re-entry in the same continuous shot.
cut_vocabulary.causally_motivated_insert: Sub-second (0.3-0.5s) static detail with named subject ('HIS hand'), never generic ('a hand').
cut_vocabulary.match_cut: Cut between two shots linked by shape, motion, or composition.
cut_vocabulary.smash_cut: Abrupt jarring cut with no transitional softening.
cut_vocabulary.L_cut: Audio from next shot leads picture.
cut_vocabulary.J_cut: Picture from next shot leads audio.
cut_vocabulary.whip_pan_transition: Blur pan that bridges two shots as a single motion.
